Court'S Motion To Dismiss Appeal
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award (Ccp 1290.4)
Off Calendar Apr-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CRISOSTOMO IBARRA'S Notice of Hearing on Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. Appearances: Gener D. Benitez, Esq., Ibarra Professional Law Corporation (415) 398-5329, appearing for Petitioner and moving party. There are no other appearances at the time the case is called. (Courtney J. Pulitzer, in Pro Per, (404) 397-1969, makes an late appearance thru CourtCall, but the Court has already made the decision and the other party is no longer in the Courtroom). The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, valid Proof of Service is provided at the hearing. No opposition filed. Petitioner is to prepare Order. (302CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
